summary: Complete testing of Location Alarm PWA - Major UI redesign (AlarmBuilder). Backend: 12/12 tests pass. Frontend: All unified AlarmBuilder flows working correctly. Old two-tab system (Single Alarm/Plan Trip) successfully removed and replaced with unified builder.

console_warnings.issue: FIXED - Nested button inside button causing HTML validation warning
console_warnings.status: RESOLVED - Changed outer button to div with role='button'

passed_tests: FRONTEND: App loads - map, top bar, bottom nav all render. No console errors.
FRONTEND: Click + → Builder drawer opens with 'Where are you going?' title (NO tabs)
FRONTEND: Search 'Hyderabad' → results appear → select → Distance/Time toggle appears
FRONTEND: Switch to Time mode → set 30min → click 'Set Destination' → Trip visual shows Hyderabad
FRONTEND: Click 'Add Waypoint' → editor opens with 'Add a stop' title
FRONTEND: Search Kurnool → set Distance mode → click 'Add Waypoint' → Kurnool inserted before Hyderabad
FRONTEND: Trip visual shows correct order: Your Location → Kurnool → Hyderabad
FRONTEND: Tap Kurnool row → editor opens → change to Time mode → Update → visual updates correctly
FRONTEND: Click 'Save Trip' → success toast → builder closes → 2 active alarms
FRONTEND: Alarms drawer shows Kurnool (80 min) and Hyderabad (30 min) with correct badges
FRONTEND: Trips drawer shows 'Kurnool to Hyderabad' with Edit button
FRONTEND: Single alarm creation - search Bangalore → set Distance → Set Destination → Save Alarm → success
FRONTEND: Top bar shows '3 active' after single alarm creation
BACKEND: GET /api/ returns API root message
BACKEND: GET /api/alarms returns alarms with trigger_mode and trigger_time
BACKEND: GET /api/trips returns trips
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms with trigger_mode='distance' - works
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms with trigger_mode='time' - works
BACKEND: PUT /api/alarms - update trigger_mode from distance to time - works
BACKEND: POST /api/trips - create trip with multiple stops - works
BACKEND: GET /api/trips/{id}/alarms - returns ordered waypoints
BACKEND: Geocode and reverse geocode endpoints working
REGRESSION: All 5 bottom nav buttons work (Trips, Alarms, +, History, Location)
REGRESSION: Tracking toggle works
REGRESSION: Map renders correctly with alarm markers
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Waypoints are inserted before destination but after existing waypoints. Test created trip Kurnool→Bengaluru→Hyderabad instead of requested Bangalore→Kurnool→Hyderabad order. This is by-design based on current insertion logic (new waypoints go before destination).
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: 1 trip (Kurnool→Hyderabad) with 2 stops, 1 single alarm (Bangalore). All deleted after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AlarmBuilder unified flow tested. Old AlarmForm and TripForm tabs removed. Builder has two views: editor (search+config) and summary (trip visual). Stop rows now use div with role='button' instead of nested buttons (HTML fix applied). Key test IDs: builder-search-input, builder-result-0, builder-mode-time, builder-mode-distance, builder-confirm-btn, builder-add-waypoint-btn, builder-save-btn, stop-row-N.
